import json, os, pathlib

creds_path = pathlib.Path\(os.getenv\(''GMAIL_CREDENTIALS_FILE'', ''/mnt/d/Gemini_Cli/hackathon/hackathon_0/AI-Employee/credentials.json''\)\)
print\(''=== File being loaded ===''\)
print\(''Path:'', creds_path\)
print\(''Exists:'', creds_path.exists\(\)\)

if creds_path.exists\(\):
    d = json.load\(open\(creds_path\)\)
    key = list\(d.keys\(\)\)[0]
    inner = d[key]
    print\(\)
    print\(''=== Structure ===''\)
    print\(''Top-level key:'', key, ''  <-- must be: installed''\)
    print\(''client_id    :'', inner.get\(''client_id'', ''MISSING''\)\)
    print\(''project_id   :'', inner.get\(''project_id'', ''MISSING''\)\)
    print\(''auth_uri     :'', inner.get\(''auth_uri'', ''MISSING''\)\)
    print\(''token_uri    :'', inner.get\(''token_uri'', ''MISSING''\)\)
    print\(''client_secret:'', ''present'' if inner.get\(''client_secret''\) else ''MISSING''\)
    print\(''redirect_uris:'', inner.get\(''redirect_uris'', []\)\)
")

from src.utils.cross_dedup import CrossSourceDedup
import tempfile, pathlib, json

store = pathlib.Path\(tempfile.mktemp\(suffix='.json'\)\)
dedup = CrossSourceDedup\(store_path=store\)

assert dedup.is_duplicate\('hello world', 'gmail'\) == False
assert dedup.is_duplicate\('hello world', 'whatsapp'\) == True
assert dedup.is_duplicate\('different message', 'linkedin'\) == False

data = json.loads\(store.read_text\(\)\)
assert len\(data\) == 2
store.unlink\(\)
print\('PASS: CrossSourceDedup works correctly'\)
")

    consumer_secret=os.getenv\('TWITTER_API_SECRET'\),
    access_token=os.getenv\('TWITTER_ACCESS_TOKEN'\),
    access_token_secret=os.getenv\('TWITTER_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET'\)
\)

    print\('SUCCESS:', resp\)
except Exception as e:

")

Bash(python3 -c "
import httpx, os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)

url = os.getenv\('ODOO_URL'\)
db = os.getenv\('ODOO_DB'\)
username = os.getenv\('ODOO_USERNAME'\)
password = os.getenv\('ODOO_PASSWORD'\)

print\(f'URL: {url}'\)
print\(f'DB: {db}'\)
print\(f'Username: {username}'\)
print\(f'Password: {password[:8]}...'\)

payload = {
    'jsonrpc': '2.0',
    'method': 'call',
    'params': {
        'service': 'common',
        'method': 'authenticate',
        'args': [db, username, password, {}]
    }
}

try:
    resp = httpx.post\(f'{url}/jsonrpc', json=payload, timeout=30\)
    print\(f'Status: {resp.status_code}'\)
    print\(f'Response: {resp.text[:500]}'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json, subprocess, os

env = os.environ.copy\(\)
env['ODOO_URL'] = 'https://areebazafar-ai-employee2.odoo.com'
env['ODOO_DB'] = 'areebazafar-ai-employee2'
env['ODOO_USERNAME'] = 'areebazafar715@gmail.com'
env['ODOO_PASSWORD'] = 'AreebaNAbeel484@777'

init = json.dumps\({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':1,'method':'initialize','params':{'protocolVersion':'2024-11-05','capabilities':{},'clientInfo':{'name':'test','version':'1.0'}}}\)
notif = json.dumps\({'jsonrpc':'2.0','method':'notifications/initialized'}\)

calls = [
    \(2, 'list_unpaid_invoices', {'limit': 20}\),
    \(3, 'list_overdue_payments', {'days_overdue': 7}\),
    \(4, 'create_invoice', {'partner_id': 10, 'lines': [{'name': 'SEO Optimization Package', 'quantity': 1, 'price_unit': 1800}, {'name': 'Google Ads Management', 'quantity': 1, 'price_unit': 950}], 'date_due': '2026-04-15'}\),
    \(5, 'get_partner_balance', {'partner_id': 8}\),
    \(6, 'get_financial_summary', {'period': 'monthly'}\),
]

msgs = [init, notif]
for cid, name, args in calls:
    msgs.append\(json.dumps\({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':cid,'method':'tools/call','params':{'name':name,'arguments':args}}\)\)

all_input = '\\n'.join\(msgs\) + '\\n'

proc = subprocess.run\(['node', 'mcp/odoo-server/src/index.js'], input=all_input, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=90, env=env\)

for line in proc.stderr.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\):
    print\(f'[SERVER] {line}'\)

labels = {2:'LIST UNPAID INVOICES', 3:'LIST OVERDUE PAYMENTS', 4:'CREATE INVOICE \(MCP\)', 5:'PARTNER BALANCE \(AI Employee Hub\)', 6:'FINANCIAL SUMMARY'}

print\('\\n' + '='*70\)
for line in proc.stdout.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\):
    if not line.strip\(\): continue
    try:
        data = json.loads\(line\)
        rid = data.get\('id'\)
        if rid in labels:
            print\(f'\\n--- {labels[rid]} ---'\)
            content = data.get\('result',{}\).get\('content',[]\)
            is_err = data.get\('result',{}\).get\('isError', False\)
            for c in content:
                try:
                    parsed = json.loads\(c.get\('text',''\)\)
                    print\(json.dumps\(parsed, indent=2\)[:600]\)
                except:
                    print\(c.get\('text',''\)[:600]\)
            if is_err:
                print\('  [ERROR]'\)
    except: pass
" 2>&1)
